pages.text:
THE UNITED REPUBLIC OF TANZANIA

FAC/T.90/13/80

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

The Government of the United Republic of Tanzania declares that it adheres to the convention concerning

international

exhibitions signed in Paris on the 22nd of November 1928, as amended by the Protocols of 30th Of November 1972 and 31st of May 988 and that it will fulfil in good faith all obligations as rovided in the Convention and the Protocols.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed the present Instrument.

氏

DONE at Dar es salaam on this-.!°

..- day or - June..

the Year One Thousand Nine Hundred and Ninety Seven.

Maishit Lianel akaya M. Kikwet

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND INTERNATIONAL COOPERATION

THE UNITED REPUBLIC OF TANZANIA

FAC/T.90/13/80

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

The Government of the United Republic of Tanzania declares that it adheres

TO

the convention concerning international

exhibitions signed in Paris on the 22nd of November 1928, as amended by the Protocols of 30th of November 1972 and 31st of May 1988 and that it will fulfil in good faith

all obligations as

provided in the convention and the Protocols.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have signed the present Instrument.

DONE at Dar es salaam on this- 10h

. day of -uune...

the Year One Thousand Nine Hundred and Ninety Seven.

Maisitside

Jakaya M. Kikwete

MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS AND INTERNATIONAL COOPERATION
